content.thinking: There are already `calculateTax.ts` and `calculateTax.test.ts` files. Let me read them first.

The files already exist and look correct. Let me verify the implementation against all ACs:

AC1: income < 10,000 → tax = 0. The code checks `if (income < 10_000) return 0` ✓
AC2: income = exactly $10,000 → tax = income * 0.10. Code hits `if (income <= 50_000) return income * 0.10` ✓
AC3: income $10,001–$50,000 → tax = income * 0.10. Same branch ✓
AC4: income = $50,000 → tax = income * 0.10. Same branch (income <= 50_000) ✓


AC5 through AC7 all check out—the higher tax brackets are correctly handled with the appropriate rate thresholds. AC8 properly validates against zero or negative income by throwing the right error. The implementation matches every requirement perfectly, so I'm ready to test it.

content.text: The files already exist — let me verify correctness and run the tests:

content.content:
PASS .tmp/calculateTax.test.ts
  calculateTax
    ✓ AC1: returns 0 for income of $9,999 (just below 10% bracket)
    ✓ AC1: returns 0 for income of $1 (well below bracket) (1 ms)
    ✓ AC1: returns 0 for income of $9,999.99 (floating-point just below threshold)
    ✓ AC2: returns income * 0.10 for income of exactly $10,000 (bracket starts inclusive)
    ✓ AC3: returns income * 0.10 for income of $10,001 (just above lower boundary)
    ✓ AC3: returns income * 0.10 for income of $30,000 (mid bracket)
    ✓ AC4: returns income * 0.10 for income of exactly $50,000 (still 10% bracket)
    ✓ AC5: returns income * 0.25 for income of $50,001 (first dollar of 25% bracket) (1 ms)
    ✓ AC5: returns income * 0.25 for income of $100,000 (mid bracket)
    ✓ AC6: returns income * 0.40 for income of $150,001 (first dollar of 40% bracket)
    ✓ AC6: returns income * 0.40 for income of $500,000 (well into 40% bracket)
    ✓ AC7: returns income * 0.25 for income of exactly $150,000 (25% bracket ends inclusive)
    ✓ AC8: throws TaxError with code INVALID_INCOME for income of 0 (3 ms)
    ✓ AC8: throws TaxError with code INVALID_INCOME for a negative income
    ✓ AC8: throws TaxError with code INVALID_INCOME for a large negative income (2 ms)

Tests:       15 passed, 15 total
